sourceTitle: Guidance for use of Generative AI tools
evidenceSnippetOriginal: Be aware that information generated by AI may be inaccurate, incomplete, misleading, biased, fabricated, or may contain material subject to a third party's intellectual property ownership. You are responsible for the accuracy of any information you publish, including AI-generated content.
evidenceLocator: Section: 'Ensure accuracy before publishing AI-generated information'
